signals.headline: Headline inflation in South Korea remained at 2
signals.raw:
Headline inflation in South Korea remained at 2.0% year-on-year in February 2026**, with core inflation rising to 2.3%[1]. The Bank of Korea's CPI forecast for 2026 was updated to 2.2% from 2.0%, reflecting oil price developments and Korean won weakness[1].

However, this is not breaking news—it's historical data from two months ago. To identify what has "just been confirmed, announced, or resolve
